body.content:
Best Tokyo Budget Hotels 2026
Yes, you can get a room in central Tokyo for less than US$140 per night! Here are the best Tokyo hotels in the budget category, all personally inspected.
![Double twin guest room with vibrating chair in the Remm Hibiya hotel, Tokyo, Japan](https://photos.smugmug.com/photos/i-TKdfNgc/0/b574ca88/L/i-TKdfNgc-L.jpg "Double twin guest room with vibrating chair in the Remm Hibiya hotel, Tokyo, Japan")
Remm Hibiya
A budget hotel in Tokyo costs less than ¥20,000 (about US$136) for a single, twin or double. Here are our favorite budget hotels in the city, based on price, quality, location and service. Here are some highlights from the list:
* Lowest price - **[Super Hotel Asakusa](https://trulytokyo.com/super-hotel-asakusa-tokyo/):** Less than US$100 per room on average.
* Best location - **[Sotetsu Fresa Inn Higashi Shinjuku](https://trulytokyo.com/hotel-sunroute-higashi-shinjuku-tokyo/):** Next to Higashi-Shinjuku Station.
* Best for families – **[Ueno Touganeya Hotel](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-ueno-touganeya-hotel-tokyo/):** Great family rooms and ultra-low rates.
* Best quality – **[Dormy Inn Akihabara](https://trulytokyo.com/dormy-inn-akihabara-tokyo/):** Midrange hotel features at budget rates.
* Best feature – **[Remm Hibiya](https://trulytokyo.com/remm-hibiya-hotel-tokyo/):** In-room massage chairs.
* Scroll down for all the details.
Recommended Budget Tokyo Hotels
[![Compact double room with desk and television in the Dormy Inn Akihabara hotel, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Compact double room with desk and television in the Dormy Inn Akihabara hotel, Tokyo, Japan")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/dormy-inn-akihabara.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-01)[Dormy Inn](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/dormy-inn-akihabara.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-02)Akihabara[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/dormy-inn-akihabara.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-03)
[![A guest room in the Remm Hibuya hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with orange interiors, bed, shower room, and massage chair](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "A guest room in the Remm Hibuya hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with orange interiors, bed, shower room, and massage chair")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/remm-hibiyia.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-04)[Remm Hibuya](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/remm-hibiyia.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-05)Ginza[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/remm-hibiyia.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-06)
[![Twin beds in a Touganeya Hotel double room, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Twin beds in a Touganeya Hotel double room, Tokyo, Japan")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ueno-touganeya.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-07)[Touganeya Hotel](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ueno-touganeya.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-08)Ueno[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ueno-touganeya.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-09)
[![Double bed with overhead single bunk in a Super Hotel Asakusa triple room, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Double bed with overhead single bunk in a Super Hotel Asakusa triple room, Tokyo, Japan")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/super-asakusa.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-10)[Super Hotel](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/super-asakusa.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-11)Asakusa[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/super-asakusa.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-12)
![Compact double room with desk and television in the Dormy Inn Akihabara hotel, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='599'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20599'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Compact double room with desk and television in the Dormy Inn Akihabara hotel, Tokyo, Japan")
Dormy Inn Akihabara double room
## [Dormy Inn Akihabara](https://trulytokyo.com/dormy-inn-akihabara-tokyo/) ([Akihabara](https://trulytokyo.com/akihabara-kanda-and-jimbocho/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/dormy-inn-akihabara.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=159166&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
With a sento, free ramen, coin washing machines and super-reasonable budget rates, this hotel is a great value.
![A guest room in the Remm Hibuya hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with orange interiors, bed, shower room, and massage chair](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "A guest room in the Remm Hibuya hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with orange interiors, bed, shower room, and massage chair")
Remm Hibuya room with massage chair
## [Remm Hibiya](https://trulytokyo.com/remm-hibiya-hotel-tokyo/) ([Ginza](https://trulytokyo.com/ginza/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/remm-hibiyia.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=503252&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
With a great location convenient to Ginza and Tokyo Station, in-room massage chairs, a Café Muji restaurant, and rates from budget to moderate, this is one of the best hotel deals in the city.
![Twin beds in a Touganeya Hotel double room, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='600'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20600'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Twin beds in a Touganeya Hotel double room, Tokyo, Japan")
Touganeya Hotel double room
## [Tokyo Ueno Touganeya Hotel](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-ueno-touganeya-hotel-tokyo/) ([Ueno](https://trulytokyo.com/ueno/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ueno-touganeya.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=96266&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
With a great location, just steps from Ueno Station, a full no-smoking policy, excellent family rooms and a friendly staff, this hotel is a winner.
![Double bed with overhead single bunk in a Super Hotel Asakusa triple room, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='600'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20600'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Double bed with overhead single bunk in a Super Hotel Asakusa triple room, Tokyo, Japan")
Super Hotel Asakusa triple room
## [Super Hotel Asakusa](https://trulytokyo.com/super-hotel-asakusa-tokyo/) ([Asakusa](https://trulytokyo.com/asakusa/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/super-asakusa.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=288711&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
Up in Asakusa, this simple, convenient business hotel is reasonably comfortable and the rates are super cheap.
![Twin guest room in the Sotetsu Fresa Inn Higashi Shinjuku hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with dark brown and green interiors and padded headboards](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='600'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20600'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Twin guest room in the Sotetsu Fresa Inn Higashi Shinjuku hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with dark brown and green interiors and padded headboards")
Sotetsu Fresa Inn Higashi Shinjuku guest room
## [Sotetsu Fresa Inn Higashi Shinjuku](https://trulytokyo.com/hotel-sunroute-higashi-shinjuku-tokyo/) ([Shinjuku](https://trulytokyo.com/shinjuku/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/sunroute-higashi-shinjuku.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=76398&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
There aren’t many good budget hotels in sought-after Shinjuku, but this is one of them. It’s a bit of walk to the station, but you’re next to a subway station that will get you there in a minute or so. It’s a very well run and efficient business hotel.
![Akihabara Washington Hotel twin room in Tokyo, Japan, with brown and beige interiors and two large beds](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='566'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20566'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Akihabara Washington Hotel twin room in Tokyo, Japan, with brown and beige interiors and two large beds")
Akihabara Washington Hotel twin room
## [Akihabara Washington Hotel](https://trulytokyo.com/akihabara-washington-hotel-tokyo/) ([Akihabara](https://trulytokyo.com/akihabara-kanda-and-jimbocho/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/akihabara-washington.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=51488&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
With a super-convenient Akihabara location, good simple rooms, and rates from budget to moderate, this hotel is a great value.
![Twin room in the Richmond Hotel Asakusa, Tokyo, Japan, with armchair, standing lamp, and small side table](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Twin room in the Richmond Hotel Asakusa, Tokyo, Japan, with armchair, standing lamp, and small side table")
Richmond Hotel Asakusa twin room
## [Richmond Hotel Asakusa](https://trulytokyo.com/richmond-hotel-asakusa-tokyo/) ([Asakusa](https://trulytokyo.com/asakusa/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/richmond-asakusa.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=294529&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
Located right in the heart of Asakusa, this stylish business hotel is a step up from others in its class. It’s the perfect location for exploring Asakusa and Ueno.
![Angular triple guest room in the b Tokyo Ochanomizu hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with three large beds and large TV](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='508'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20508'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Angular triple guest room in the b Tokyo Ochanomizu hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with three large beds and large TV")
b Tokyo Ochanomizu triple room
## [The b Tokyo Ochanomizu](https://trulytokyo.com/b-tokyo-ochanomizu-tokyo/) ([Ochanomizu](https://trulytokyo.com/akihabara-kanda-and-jimbocho/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/zabiocha-noshui.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=148856&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
A very simple business hotel in a decent Ochanomizu location. Rates among the cheapest in town.
![Two large twin beds in a Comfort Hotel guest room, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='600'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20600'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Two large twin beds in a Comfort Hotel guest room, Tokyo, Japan")
Comfort Hotel guest room
## [Comfort Hotel Tokyo Kanda](https://trulytokyo.com/comfort-hotel-tokyo-kanda-tokyo/) ([Akihabara](https://trulytokyo.com/akihabara-kanda-and-jimbocho/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/comfort-tokyo-kanda.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=193981&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
This very simple business hotel is in Kanda, which is one stop north of Tokyo Station. Kanda itself is packed with restaurants.
![Twin double beds and a green interior design in the Hotel Sardonyx Ueno, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='534'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20534'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Twin double beds and a green interior design in the Hotel Sardonyx Ueno, Tokyo, Japan")
Hotel Sardonyx guest room
## [Hotel Sardonyx Ueno](https://trulytokyo.com/hotel-sardonyx-ueno-tokyo/) ([Ueno](https://trulytokyo.com/ueno/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/sardonyx-ueno.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=81791&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
This business hotel up in Ueno is a great value and it’s quite close to the sights and the Yamanote Line.
![Double bed with waffle bedding and clean wooden floors in a guest room of the Unplan Kagurazaka hotel, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Double bed with waffle bedding and clean wooden floors in a guest room of the Unplan Kagurazaka hotel, Tokyo, Japan")
Unplan Kagurazaka guest room
## [Unplan Kagurazaka](https://trulytokyo.com/unplan-kagurazaka/) ([Imperial Palace Area](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-imperial-palace-and-around/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/unplan-kagurazaka.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=1160488&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
This sociable hostel has dorm rooms and private rooms and some of the lowest rates in town. It’s a GREAT value.
![Hotel Monterey Hanzomon guest room in Tokyo, Japan, with two large single beds and a spare bed by the window](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='800'%20height='533'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20533'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Hotel Monterey Hanzomon guest room in Tokyo, Japan, with two large single beds and a spare bed by the window")
Hotel Monterey Hanzomon guest room
## [Hotel Monterey Hanzomon](https://trulytokyo.com/hotel-monterey-hanzomon-tokyo/) ([Imperial Palace Area](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-imperial-palace-and-around/))
(View on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/monterey-hanzomon.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels) or [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?CID=1741664&pcs=1&hid=71712&tag=TT-Best-Tokyo-budget-hotels))
A little out of the way but a great value. It’s a nice hotel and it’s quite close to a subway station.
##
Check Hotel Availability

Destination

#### Check-out date
![Booking.com](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='150'%20height='0'%20viewBox='0%200%20150%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
## More Information
* If you’re really looking to save some money and you want an “only in Japan” experience, try a night in a [capsule hotel](https://trulytokyo.com/best-capsule-hotels-in-tokyo/).
* If you’re able to spend a little more, consider a [midrange hotel](https://trulytokyo.com/best-tokyo-mid-range-and-business-hotels/).
* Location is hugely important in Tokyo, so check our [Where to Stay in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/where-to-stay-in-tokyo/) page.
* For more hotel choices, check out [Tokyo Hotels](https://trulytokyo.com/tokyo-hotels/) page.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='64'%20height='0'%20viewBox='0%200%2064%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Map Marker")
### Where Are These Places Located?
See these places on the Truly Tokyo Google map:
* [Open the Tokyo map](https://www.google.com/maps/d/edit?mid=zy8a03W_hbJ0.kyfq6Ra2saKQ&usp=sharing)
* You will see the list of places on the left hand side. (Click the 3-line icon in the top left corner if not). Scroll down or use the map search (the magnifying glass icon) to find the place you want.
* Click the name of the place in the list. Its location pin will be highlighted on the map.
* Map pins are color coded - BLUE: Hotels / Ryokan / Guesthouses | VIOLET: Ryokan | PINK: Places to Eat | GREEN: Shops | YELLOW: Things to See and Do
* If you're using the map on your phone, open the map and then search for the name of the place. The map will then zoom in on its location.
### Tokyo Vacation Checklist
* [ESSENTIALS](https://trulytokyo.com/first-time-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-01) – For all the essentials in a brief overview, see my [First Time In Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/first-time-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-02) guide
* [HOTELS](https://www.booking.com/city/jp/tokyo.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Checklist-03) – Check Tokyo accommodation availability and pricing on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/city/jp/tokyo.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Checklist-04) and [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?pcs=1&cid=1743457&city=5085&tag=TT-Checklist-05) - often you can book with no upfront payment and free cancellation
* [WHERE TO STAY](https://trulytokyo.com/where-to-stay-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-06) – Need tips on where to stay? See my one page guide [Where To Stay In Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/where-to-stay-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-07)
* [BULLET TRAIN](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/en-US/rails-32/1012-japan/) – You can buy [shinkansen (bullet train) tickets online](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/en-US/rails-32/1012-japan/) from Klook - popular routes include [Tokyo to Kyoto](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/rails-32/1012-japan/route-1305/tokyo-to-kyoto-trains/), [Tokyo to Osaka](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/rails-32/1012-japan/route-1304/tokyo-to-shin-osaka-trains/) and [Tokyo to Hiroshima](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/rails-32/1012-japan/route-1310/tokyo-to-hiroshima-trains/)
* [SIM CARDS](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=877200&k_site=https://www.klook.com/search/result/?query=japan%20esim) – You can [buy an eSim](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=877200&k_site=https://www.klook.com/search/result/?query=japan%20esim) to activate in Japan or [buy a Japan SIM card online](<https://www.getyourguide.com/s/?q=tokyo sim&searchSource=8&partner_id=LAMDN2W&utm_medium=online_publisher&placement=content-middle&cmp=TT-Checklist-08>) for collection on arrival at Tokyo Narita or Haneda airports. Or rent an [unlimited data pocket wifi router](<https://www.getyourguide.com/s/?q=japan wifi&searchSource=7&partner_id=LAMDN2W&utm_medium=online_publisher&placement=content-middle&cmp=TT-Checklist-09>)
* [PACKING LIST](https://insideosaka.com/packing-list-for-japan/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-10) – See my comprehensive [Packing List For Japan](https://insideosaka.com/packing-list-for-japan/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-11)
* [FLIGHTS](https://www.skyscanner.net/g/referrals/v1/flights/cheap-flights-to?adId=1100662&campaignId=13416&destination=tyoa&mediaPartnerId=1924024) – Compare airline flight prices and timings for [the best Japan flight deals](https://www.skyscanner.net/g/referrals/v1/flights/cheap-flights-to?adId=1100662&campaignId=13416&destination=tyoa&mediaPartnerId=1924024). Check my guides to [arriving at Narita Airport](https://trulytokyo.com/arriving-at-tokyos-narita-international-airport/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-12) and [at Haneda Airport](https://trulytokyo.com/arriving-at-tokyo-haneda-international-airport/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-13).
* [JAPAN RAIL PASS](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=1591&aff_adid=616549&k_site=https://www.klook.com/activity/1420-7-day-whole-japan-rail-pass-jr-pass/) – If you're visiting more than one city, you might save money with a [Japan Rail Pass](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=1591&aff_adid=616549&k_site=https://www.klook.com/activity/1420-7-day-whole-japan-rail-pass-jr-pass/) – see if [it's worth it](https://trulytokyo.com/japan-rail-pass-how-to-get-it/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-14) for you
* [TRAVEL INSURANCE](https://www.tkqlhce.com/click-7919142-15371527) – [World Nomads](https://www.tkqlhce.com/click-7919142-15371527) offers simple and flexible travel insurance. Buy at home or while traveling and claim online from anywhere in the world
* [WANT HELP?](https://trulytokyo.com/japan-travel-consulting/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-15) – Do you want help planning your trip? Chris Rowthorn and his team of Japan experts at [Japan Travel Consulting](https://trulytokyo.com/japan-travel-consulting/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-16) can help
